sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
purpose: Audit whether KOTOR feats are implemented with the correct runtime shape, not merely whether they exist or have any metadata.
accuracyStandard: implemented_correct requires the implementation mode to match the feat rules behavior.
Wrong-shape automation is implemented_incorrect, even if the feat has an effect entry.
Metadata-only handling is implemented_partial unless the feat is intentionally metadata/manual.
Action economy, reaction, selected-choice, and encounter-use feats must have runtime hooks before they count as correct.

statusDefinitions.implemented_correct: Runtime shape matches source behavior closely enough for current system scope.
statusDefinitions.implemented_partial: Some correct metadata/rule shape exists, but runtime hook, picker, trigger, duration, or usage tracking is not proven.
statusDefinitions.implemented_incorrect: Observed implementation grants the wrong kind of benefit or applies in the wrong context.
statusDefinitions.not_implemented: No meaningful metadata or runtime behavior was found.
statusDefinitions.metadata_correct: The feat is intentionally metadata/manual and should not be automated.
statusDefinitions.source_review_required: Need exact source context before deciding implementation shape.

feats.name: Accelerated Strike
feats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
feats.description: Once per encounter, when using only weapons with which you are proficient, you can take a Full Attack Action as a Standard Action.
feats.expectedRuleShape: Once per encounter, take a Full Attack as a Standard Action when using only proficient weapons.
feats.observedImplementation: Current metadata correctly says this is action economy rather than an attack bonus, but there is no proven runtime action card / full-attack-as-standard workflow.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs an encounter action button or combat option that changes action economy; a flat attack modifier would be wrong.

feats.name: Conditioning
feats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
feats.description: You can reroll any Strength - or Constitution -based Skill Checks for Skills that you are Trained in. The result of the reroll must be accepted even if it is worse. Additionally, once per encounter you can add your Strength modifier to your Fortitude Defense as a Reaction ; this bonus lasts until the beginning of your next turn.
feats.expectedRuleShape: Reroll trained Strength- or Constitution-based skill checks; once per encounter add Strength modifier to Fortitude Defense as a reaction until next turn.
feats.observedImplementation: Metadata recognizes reroll/resource context but does not prove trained Str/Con skill detection, reroll prompt, encounter usage, or reaction Fortitude duration.
feats.accuracyFinding: Correct implementation requires both a skill reroll hook and a temporary defense reaction.

feats.name: Critical Strike
feats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
feats.description: While wielding a weapon for which you possess the Weapon Focus feat, you can take two consecutive Swift Actions in the same round to increase the critical threat range of your next melee attack by 1. Thus, if a weapon scores a Critical Hit on a Natural 20, it can score a Critical Hit on a natural roll of 19 or 20 instead. However, any roll other than a Natural 20 is not considered an automatic hit; if you roll a Natural 19 and miss the target, you do not score a Critical Hit. You lose the benefits of Critical Strike if you lose line of sight to your target or if you take any other Action before making your attack.
feats.expectedRuleShape: Two swift actions to increase next qualifying melee attack threat range by 1 with a Weapon Focus weapon.
feats.observedImplementation: abilityMeta.rules defines ATTACK_OPTION criticalStrike with melee requirement, two swift actions, Weapon Focus matching, and criticalThreatNaturalMin 19; combat-option resolver supports critical threat modifiers.
feats.accuracyFinding: Rule shape matches source behavior and avoids static attack/damage bonuses.

feats.name: Flurry
feats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
feats.description: When wielding only Light weapons or Lightsabers, you can make a flurry of attacks. You take a -5 penalty to your Reflex Defense, but you gain a +2 bonus on your melee attack rolls. This bonus on attacks and penalty to Reflex Defense apply until the start of your next turn.
feats.expectedRuleShape: With only light weapons or lightsabers, gain +2 melee attack and take -5 Reflex until start of next turn.
feats.observedImplementation: abilityMeta.rules defines ATTACK_OPTION flurry with melee/light/lightsaber requirements, +2 attack, and a Reflex defense modifier; combat option resolver supports attack and defense modifiers.
feats.accuracyFinding: Implemented as selectable attack option rather than passive sheet math.

feats.name: Force Readiness
feats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
feats.description: You can spend Force Points as a Free Action, even if it is not your turn. All other restrictions to Force Point use still apply.
feats.expectedRuleShape: Spend Force Points as a Free Action even outside your turn, while all other Force Point restrictions still apply.
feats.observedImplementation: Metadata/resource rule exists, but no proven Force Point spending gate checks out-of-turn permission from this feat.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs Force Point spend workflow integration; not a static Force feat bonus.

feats.name: Gearhead
feats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
feats.description: Once per encounter, you can make Mechanics and Use Computer checks more quickly than normal. A check requiring a Full-Round Action can be attempted as a Standard Action, a check requiring a Standard Action can be attempted as a Move Action, and a check requiring a Move Action can be attempted as a Swift Action. Checks requiring multiple Swift Actions can be reduced by one Swift Action. Checks requiring more than a Full-Round Action can be attempted in one-half the amount of time required at a -10 penalty.
feats.expectedRuleShape: Once per encounter, reduce Mechanics/Use Computer check time by one action step or halve long tasks at -10.
feats.observedImplementation: Metadata-only skill-use timing rule; no proven Mechanics/Use Computer action-time picker or once-per-encounter usage tracking.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs skill-use workflow/action economy support, not a skill bonus.

feats.name: Implant Training
feats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
feats.description: You are not moved an extra step down the Condition Track when you would normally be moved down the Condition Track.
feats.expectedRuleShape: Suppress extra condition-track step and -2 Will Defense penalty from active implants.
feats.observedImplementation: Catalog contains resource rules for suppressing implant CT and Will penalties, but this repo baseline does not include the ImplantRules runtime engine; if the earlier implant phases are merged, this should become implemented_correct.
feats.accuracyFinding: Correct runtime home is ImplantRules/defense/condition-track hooks; metadata alone is insufficient.

feats.name: Improved Rapid Strike
feats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
feats.description: When using a Light Melee Weapon or Lightsaber with the Rapid Strike Feat, you can take a -5 penalty to your attack roll to gain +2 dice of damage on a successful strike.
feats.expectedRuleShape: When using Rapid Strike with a light melee weapon or lightsaber, take -5 attack for +2 weapon damage dice; does not stack with Rapid Strike extra damage.
feats.observedImplementation: abilityMeta.rules defines ATTACK_OPTION improvedRapidStrike with melee/light/lightsaber requirements, -5 attack, +2 weapon dice; combat-option resolver supports extra weapon dice.
feats.accuracyFinding: Correctly modeled as selectable attack option rather than static damage.

feats.name: Increased Agility
feats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
feats.description: You increase your Climb Speed, Swim Speed and Jump distance by +2 squares and do not lose your Dexterity bonus to Reflex Defense when climbing.
feats.expectedRuleShape: +2 squares to climb speed, swim speed, and jump distance; retain Dexterity bonus to Reflex while climbing.
feats.observedImplementation: Structured rules exist as metadata, but no proof the movement/Reflex while climbing calculators consume them.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs derived movement and climbing defense integration.

feats.name: Logic Upgrade: Self-Defense
feats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
feats.description: Grant yourself +2 to the Defense of your choice for 1 round.
feats.expectedRuleShape: Droid-only active logic upgrade choosing one defense to gain +2 for 1 round.
feats.observedImplementation: Metadata identifies temporary defense choice and selected choice requirement, but no proven action button, defense picker, duration, or usage tracking.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs droid action/picker workflow; static defense bonus would be wrong.

feats.name: Logic Upgrade: Tactician
feats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
feats.description: Grant a +5 bonus to attack with a successful Aid Another attempt.
feats.expectedRuleShape: Droid Aid Another support that can grant +5 to an ally attack after a successful Aid Another attempt.
feats.observedImplementation: Metadata says no self attack bonus and Aid Another support, but no proven Aid Another hook that changes the ally bonus to +5.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs Aid Another workflow integration, not self attack math.

feats.name: Mandalorian Training
feats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
feats.description: When using the Charging Fire Feat, you gain a +2 bonus to a ranged attack made at the end of a Charge. As with a normal Charge, you still take a -2 penalty to your Reflex Defense, but you also gain a +2 morale bonus to your Will Defense until the beginning of your next turn.
feats.expectedRuleShape: +2 ranged attack when using Charging Fire; still take charge Reflex penalty and gain +2 morale Will until next turn.
feats.observedImplementation: abilityMeta.rules defines ATTACK_OPTION mandalorianTrainingChargingFire requiring ranged attack, charge, and Charging Fire option with +2 attack; combat-option resolver supports requiresOption. Will rider remains contextual metadata.
feats.accuracyFinding: The main attack rider is correctly modeled; Will rider should be verified in later runtime tests.

feats.name: Poison Resistance
feats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
feats.description: You gain a +5 bonus to your Fortitude Defense when attacked by Poison. If the attack succeeds, you take only half damage.
feats.expectedRuleShape: +5 Fortitude Defense against poison; if poison succeeds, take half damage.
feats.observedImplementation: Metadata-only conditional defense note; no proven PoisonEngine hook for +5 Fortitude or half damage on poison success.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs PoisonEngine integration.

feats.name: Power Blast
feats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
feats.description: As a Swift Action, before making an attack roll, you can choose to subtract a number from all ranged attack rolls and add the same number to all ranged damage rolls. This number cannot exceed your Base Attack Bonus. The penalty on attacks and bonus on damage applies until the start of your next turn but you gain no bonus to damage with Area Attacks or when attacking objects or Vehicles with this Feat.
feats.expectedRuleShape: Swift action ranged tradeoff: subtract up to BAB from ranged attack rolls and add same number to ranged damage; excludes area attacks, objects, and vehicles.
feats.observedImplementation: abilityMeta.rules defines ATTACK_OPTION powerBlast slider up to BAB with ranged requirement, -value attack, +value damage, and area/object/vehicle exclusions in summary; combat-option resolver supports slider formulas.
feats.accuracyFinding: Correctly represented as an attack option slider rather than a flat bonus.

feats.name: Quick Skill
feats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
feats.description: Once per encounter, you can Take 10 when rushed on a single Skill Check for a Skill you are Trained in, unless the Skill description explicitly forbids it. Alternatively, you can Take 20 when using a Skill you are Trained in at half the normal time required.
feats.expectedRuleShape: Once per encounter, Take 10 while rushed on one trained skill check, or Take 20 in half normal time for a trained skill.
feats.observedImplementation: Metadata-only skill-use economy rule with selected skill requirement; no proven Take 10/Take 20 workflow or encounter tracking.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs skill-use modal integration.

feats.name: Republic Military Training
feats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
feats.description: Once per encounter, as a Reaction, you gain Damage Reduction 10 against an incoming attack if you have Cover from the attacker. You can gain the Damage Reduction as long as you have Cover, even if your opponent uses Aim to ignore your Cover bonus to Reflex Defense.
feats.expectedRuleShape: Once per encounter reaction: gain DR 10 against incoming attack if you have cover from the attacker, even if Aim ignores cover Reflex bonus.
feats.observedImplementation: Metadata-only reaction note; no proven incoming damage hook, cover context, or once-per-encounter reaction prompt.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs damage intake reaction workflow and cover context.

feats.name: Sith Military Training
feats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
feats.description: Once per encounter, as a Reaction when you reduce a target to 0 Hit Points or deal damage that exceeds the target's Damage Threshold, you can activate this Feat to cause all enemies within 6 squares of that target to take a -2 penalty to all Defenses until the end of your next turn. This is a Mind-Affecting effect.
feats.expectedRuleShape: Once per encounter reaction after reducing target to 0 HP or exceeding DT; enemies within 6 squares of that target take -2 to all defenses until end of your next turn; mind-affecting.
feats.observedImplementation: Metadata correctly captures trigger and defense debuff concept, but no proven target set, range, duration, mind-affecting immunity, or reaction prompt.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs combat event trigger plus area targeting and status/duration support.

feats.name: Sniper Shot
feats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
feats.description: When wielding only ranged weapons with which you are proficient, you gain a +2 bonus on all your ranged attacks until the beginning of your next turn, but you take a -5 penalty to Reflex Defense.
feats.expectedRuleShape: +2 ranged attacks until next turn, -5 Reflex; cannot be used with vehicle weapons or heavy weapons.
feats.observedImplementation: abilityMeta.rules defines ATTACK_OPTION sniperShot with ranged requirement, heavy/vehicle exclusion, +2 attack, and Reflex penalty; feat-combat-actions also includes a Sniper Shot action.
feats.accuracyFinding: Correctly modeled as an explicit ranged attack option.

feats.name: Tumble Defense
feats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
feats.description: When an opponent attempts to Tumble through a square you threaten with a melee weapon with which you are proficient, add your Base Attack Bonus to the DC of the Acrobatics check made to Tumble. If the target fails the Acrobatics check to Tumble, you can make an Attack of Opportunity against that opponent as normal.
feats.expectedRuleShape: When an opponent tumbles through a threatened square, add your BAB to that Acrobatics DC and allow normal AoO on failure.
feats.observedImplementation: Metadata-only conditional defense note; no proven enemy Acrobatics/Tumble DC hook or threatened-square context.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs movement/zone-control interaction; actor defense bonus would be wrong.

feats.name: Withdrawal Strike
feats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
feats.description: When taking this Feat, select a single Exotic Weapon (Melee) or melee weapon group with which you are proficient. When wielding that chosen Exotic Weapon (Melee) or melee weapon from the chosen group, adjacent opponents may not Withdraw from squares you threaten. They may still make Acrobatics checks to Tumble as normal.
feats.expectedRuleShape: Choose one melee weapon group or melee exotic weapon; adjacent opponents cannot Withdraw from squares you threaten while you wield that choice.
feats.observedImplementation: Metadata captures required persistent choice and disables false numeric modifier, but no proven selected-choice enforcement or movement/withdraw hook.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs choice capture plus movement action enforcement.
